summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. Monolithic server.py (4827 lines) successfully split into 10 modular route files. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard, Atendimentos list, Novo Atendimento form, Textos Padrões all loading correctly.

issues: Console warning: chart dimensions -1x-1 - recharts components reporting negative dimensions during initial render. Minor cosmetic issue.

passed_tests: API: POST /api/auth/login - standard user login success
API: PUT /api/chamados/{id} - update with auto-cleanup motivo logic preserved
UI: Login form works with admin credentials
UI: Dashboard loads with stats (1355 total, 325 pending, 1030 resolved)
UI: Atendimentos list loads with filters
UI: Novo Atendimento form loads correctly
UI: Textos Padrões page loads (73 textos)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: server.py reduced from ~4827 lines to ~80 lines
All 10 route modules properly structured with APIRouter(prefix='/api')
Auto-cleanup of motivo_pendencia when closing chamados preserved in routes/chamados.py lines 260-265
Google Sheets integration imported with try/except for graceful fallback
Minor: console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) during initial render - recharts sizing issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete and verified. The monolithic server.py was split into: auth.py, chamados.py, dashboard.py, pedidos.py, textos.py, relatorios.py, notificacoes.py, admin.py, devolucoes.py, google_sheets_routes.py. All endpoints preserved with same routes. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_backend.py covers all major routes. Database has 1355 chamados and 153799 pedidos ERP.

route_modules: routes/dashboard.py - stats, V2 endpoints (visao-geral, volume, classificacao, etc)
routes/pedidos.py - pedidos-erp, buscar, import, estoque, fornecedores
routes/admin.py - admin utilities, motivo updates, padronizations
